name: Sales Dashboard${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: An interactive sales analytics agent that answers pipeline and performance questions and renders a rich, interactive sales dashboard inline in Microsoft 365 Copilot.

conversation_starters.title: Pipeline by stage
conversation_starters.text: What does our pipeline look like by stage this quarter?

conversation_starters.title: Deals at risk
conversation_starters.text: Which late-stage deals look at risk and why?

conversation_starters.title: Rep leaderboard
conversation_starters.text: Who are our top performing reps?

conversation_starters.text: Show me sales performance for EMEA

conversation_starters.title: Catch me up on an account
conversation_starters.text: Catch me up on Contoso — combine our pipeline with my recent emails and meetings

conversation_starters.title: Prep for a customer meeting
conversation_starters.text: Prep me for my upcoming meetings with accounts that have deals at risk

conversation_starters.title: Draft a follow-up email
conversation_starters.text: Draft a follow-up email to the champion on my top at-risk deal, grounded in our recent thread

conversation_starters.title: Schedule a deal review
conversation_starters.text: Schedule a 30-minute review meeting next week for my biggest open deal
